zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Mohun於大約1318年出生在英國薩默塞特登斯特時，她的父親William de Mohun26歲，母親Christiane de Segrave31歲。她於1340年與Sir John Carreu II在英國威爾斯布洛可爾卡維結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1366年享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Mohun于大约1318年出生在英国薩默塞特登斯特时，她的父亲William de Mohun26岁，母亲Christiane de Segrave31岁。她于1340年与Sir John Carreu II在英国威尔斯布洛可爾卡維结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1366年享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Mohun was born about 1318, in Dunster, Somerset, England, her father, William de Mohun, was 26 and her mother, Christiane de Segrave, was 31. She married Sir John Carreu II in 1340, in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1366, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Mohun est née environ 1318, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William de Mohun, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Christiane de Segrave, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Carreu II en 1340, à Carew, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1366, à l’âge de 49 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Mohun(이)가 대략 1318년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Mohun(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christiane de Segrave(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1340년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 카레에서 Sir John Carreu II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1366년 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Mohun nasceu aproximadamente 1318, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Mohun, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Christiane de Segrave, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Carreu II em 1340, em Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1366, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Mohun родилась около 1318 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Mohun было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiane de Segrave, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Carreu II в 1340 г. в местности карю, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1366 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Mohun nació aproximadamente 1318, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Mohun, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Christiane de Segrave, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir John Carreu II en 1340, en Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1366, a la edad de 49 años.
